CHEN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF JIAYAO DU IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT COUNSEL APPEAR IN THE OSC HEARING IN DEPARTMENT 212 ON OCTOBER 7, 2009 AND CONTINUE THE OSC HEARING.
